text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The road was long and winding... Well, it was
quite short really. Since it's a sprint.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Nonetheless, the final frontier is here!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Today at the Takamatsunomiya Kinen, I will cross
paths with Flower once again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The goal is to win by 1,000 lengths!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With such an amazing win, it'll basically be
settled!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will Bakushin my way to the Tenno Sho and the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Which means I won't just have to do sprints
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll get my chance to compete again, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I have your word! Now, I will take my leave!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah, Bakushin O. It is my pleasure to—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Today, as homage to my title as class
representative, I will win against you by 1,000
lengths!
